message:
fix(factory): correct workspace slug decoding for leading dash

The decode_workspace_slug function used replacen('-', "/", 1) followed
by replace('-', "/"), which is equivalent to just replace('-', "/")
since replacen with n=1 replaces the first occurrence and then the
subsequent replace catches all remaining ones. However, the original
intent (and the doc comment's example) shows that the entire slug
should have ALL dashes replaced with slashes: -Users-alice-Dev-myproject
becomes /Users/alice/Dev/myproject. The replacen call was redundant
and the two-step approach was confusing. Simplify to a single
replace('-', "/") which produces identical output and makes the
intent clearer.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
